Every four years, we embrace the magic of the Summer Olympic Games. We watch from the sidelines as athletes display superhero levels of physical and mental strength and determination. We learn their names and their stories 芒聙聯 but how much do we know about this incredible event itself? Feeling curious? As we get ready for the Paris 2024 Summer Olympic Games, here are some fascinating and inspiring Olympics facts. Some may shock you!
